title: Add X spinoff to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [X spinoff](https://tweet-composition-and-publication-x.netlify.app/) to writing
- Adds AI features to X via X spinoff.

Fixes #9948

gist.headline: X Marks the Bot
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the greenhouse! 'X spinoff' brings AI-powered writing features directly to your tweeting workflow.
gist.summary: Added the 'X spinoff' app to the community showcase, providing AI-assisted tweet composition and publication features.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new community-built tool for generating and publishing content to X.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a writer/journalist, interacting with a little blue bird or a retro terminal displaying short messages, representing the new X/Twitter writing app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny journalist hat, typing on a retro mechanical keyboard next to a glowing blue pixel bird. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny journalist hat, typing on a retro mechanical keyboard next to a glowing blue pixel bird.
